heading: Additional prohibitions and enforcement
label: 5010 Additional prohibitions and enforcement
text: For additional prohibitions relating to this chapter and enforcement of this chapter, see .section 1826g of this title
notes: CodificationTitle VIII of and enacted substantially identical sections. Title VIII of was repealed by .Pub. L. 102–567Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 106–562
